proposed_catalog_row.Task: Derive nonlinear two-country NK trade-war model with CPI inflation targeting
proposed_catalog_row.Paper: Trade Wars and the Optimal Design of Monetary Rules
proposed_catalog_row.ModelType: Nonlinear two-country open-economy New Keynesian model
proposed_catalog_row.Category: Open economy monetary policy; endogenous tariffs; trade wars
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: CPI inflation targeting, discretionary Nash tariffs, producer-currency pricing, Rotemberg price adjustment, home bias, intermediate goods, portfolio adjustment costs
proposed_catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/Trade Wars and the Optimal Design of Monetary Rules.pdf

proposed_status_row.paper_title: Trade Wars and the Optimal Design of Monetary Rules
